analysis.summary: The technician performed a series of desktop personalization and customization tasks on a Windows 10/11 client computer. This included hiding various taskbar icons (Search, Task View, Widgets, Chat), left-aligning taskbar items, and customizing the Start menu to show common folders while disabling app recommendations. Additionally, the system theme was changed to light mode with a blue accent, and the Recycle Bin icon was removed from the desktop before the computer was put to sleep.
actions_taken: Hid Search, Task View, Widgets, and Chat icons from the taskbar
Added Downloads, Documents, Settings, Personal folder, and File Explorer shortcuts to the Start menu's 'Folders' section
Disabled 'Show recently added apps', 'Show most used apps', and 'Show recommendations' in the Start menu
Changed the system mode from Dark to Light
Set the accent color to a custom blue
Removed the Recycle Bin icon from the desktop

tech_performance.efficiency_notes: The technician worked very methodically and efficiently, navigating directly to the relevant settings pages and performing the requested customizations without hesitation or apparent uncertainty.
